title: Blazing Bamboo
description:
Adds a fiery bamboo species to the crimson forests of the Nether! 
Craft it into blaze rods and lava rafts!
body:
![Blazing Bamboo Banner](https://i.imgur.com/r6zh7zW.png)

# Blazing Bamboo

This mod adds a fiery type of bamboo to the crimson forests of the Nether!

It grows in uncommon but large patches. Its distinctive glow and yellow color make it easily visible from a distance!

Blazing bamboo has evolved many stone-like qualities to survive in its harsh dimension. It shrugs off fire, lava, and even ghast fireballs.

It can be crafted into blaze rods, makes a great furnace fuel, and its fireproof wood is good for lavaproof rafts!

Be careful, the plants glow so hot that they deal fire damage up close!

Blazing bamboo can be planted on lots of stone and dry soils across all dimensions. But it quickly dies near water, or when exposed to rain or snow.

Don't worry, the harvest isn't ruined. Dead bamboo crumbles into gunpowder!

![A naturally generated patch of blazing bamboo](https://i.imgur.com/gVFG6ef.png)

## Features

Use Just Enough Items (JEI) to view all recipes in-game.

- Peaceful renewable source of blaze rods and gunpowder
- Strong renewable furnace fuel source that can be fully automated
- Lava rafts for safe passage across lava, like lava boats!
- An expanded set of decorative blocks, including stone and wood sets
- All blocks are fire-proof, lava-proof, and ghast-proof!
- All items are fire-resistant

Check the [wiki](https://github.com/PaddedShaman/BlazingBamboo/wiki) for details!

![Blazing bamboo can be crafted into blaze rods](https://i.imgur.com/7Flmwkj.png)

## Dependencies

The Fabric version of this mod requires Fabric API.

***

You may include this mod in modpacks!

![Blazing bamboo can be placed in a flower pot](https://i.imgur.com/UgyPYh2.png)
